sentences: Category 1 service providers must offer all adult users the option to verify their identity when it is not already required for access.
Verification can use any method; documentation is not required.
Terms of service must clearly explain how the verification process works.
If a provider runs more than one Category 1 service, these duties apply to each service.
The duty covers all adult users, including existing users.
The duties only apply to the user-to-user part of the service and to design, operation and use in the United Kingdom.
An “adult user” is an adult in the UK who uses or seeks to use the service.
“Category 1 service” takes its meaning from the section 95 register.
